title: BearerAuth/BasicAuth header_value field undocumented WHY
description: The header_value field on BearerAuth and BasicAuth has no doc comment explaining why it is pre-built at construction time. The new() doc mentions validation, but a contributor reading only the struct field sees no rationale. Add a field-level doc comment: 'Pre-built at construction so validation (header character set) happens once and auth_header() is infallible.' This directly addresses the question a new contributor would ask when seeing a non-trivial field type with no explanation.
